operations.title: National Laboratory Management Warehouse
operations.summary: Centralized asset registry for lab equipment, reagents, consumables, and calibration schedules across Aetheria facilities.

operations.title: Sample Chain-of-Custody System
operations.summary: End-to-end tracking for biological, chemical, and materials samples using tamper-evident blockchain logs.

operations.title: Laboratory Waste Stewardship Program
operations.summary: Segregation, labeling, transport, and disposal workflows compliant with national chemical and biological waste regulation.

safety.title: Laboratory Biosafety Framework
safety.summary: Risk-tiered containment requirements, PPE mandates, and exposure-response protocols for BSL-1 through BSL-3 work.

safety.title: Chemical Safety Management Standard
safety.summary: GHS-compatible labeling, SDS access, spill-response, and emergency shower/eyewash inspection schedules.

safety.title: Laboratory Emergency Response Policy
safety.summary: Unified fire, spill, exposure, and evacuation playbooks with linked responder notification chains.

training.title: Laboratory Safety Training Baseline
training.summary: Mandatory onboarding curriculum covering PPE, hazard identification, waste handling, and emergency response.

training.title: Specialized Instrument Certification
training.summary: Proficiency-based certification tracks for microscopy, spectroscopy, sequencing, and cleanroom equipment.

training.title: Principal Investigator Safety Responsibility Standard
training.summary: PIs must complete annual safety leadership training covering risk assessment, delegation, and incident review.

pillars.title: Safety First
pillars.summary: Mandatory biosafety levels, incident reporting, and emergency response drills.

pillars.title: Open Science
pillars.summary: Pre-registration, open data, and replication requirements for funded research.

pillars.title: Talent Pipeline
pillars.summary: Fellowships, apprenticeships, and credential pathways for lab workforce.
